subcodes.title: Suriy-i-Fath
subcodes.first_line: O Fatḥ al-A`zam! I took firm hold of the Pen that there might be revealed for thee what will gladden thee and  generate within thy heart
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا فتح الاعظم قد اخذت القلم لننزل علیک ما یسرک و یحدث فی قلبک ما یجذبک الی
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @events in the life and ministry of the Bab, @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @suffering and imprisonment
